TopModule.BindInstances: add1_fu_473_p2 control_s_axi_U gmem_dw_w_m_axi_U gmem_in_m_axi_U gmem_out_m_axi_U gmem_pw_w_m_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Read/Write, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding, Resource Estimate
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: CTRL, 0x00, 32, RW, Control signals, 0=AP_START 1=AP_DONE 2=AP_IDLE 3=AP_READY 7=AUTO_RESTART 9=INTERRUPT
GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location, Resolution, Problem
table.column: dw_weights, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:189:20, read, Inferred, 9, DW_LOAD_W, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:186:20, ,
dw_bias, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:196:47, read, Fail, , , , 214-231, Access is clobbered by load

dw_weights, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:389:20, read, Widen Fail, , VITIS_LOOP_187_1, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:187:31, 214-353, Could not widen since type i8 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
dw_weights, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:389:20, read, Fail, , , , 214-231, Access is clobbered by acc
input, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:219:23, read, Fail, , DW_INIT_LB, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:204:21, 214-230, Stride is incompatible
input, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:221:36, read, Fail, , DW_INIT_LB, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:204:21, 214-230, Stride is incompatible
input, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:248:22, read, Fail, , DW_LOOP_W, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:244:24, 214-230, Stride is incompatible
output, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:442:57, write, Fail, , PW_LOOP_CO_TILE, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:378:30, 214-232, Access store is in the conditional branch
output, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:442:57, write, Fail, , PW_LOOP_CO_TILE, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:378:30, 214-230, Stride is incompatible

pw_weights, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:389:20, read, Widen Fail, , PW_LOAD_WGT_CI, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:387:41, 214-353, Could not widen since type i8 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 0
pw_weights, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:389:20, read, Fail, , PW_LOAD_WGT, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:383:30, 214-232, Access call is in the conditional branch
pw_weights, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:389:20, read, Inferred, variable, PW_LOAD_WGT_CI, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:387:41, ,
pw_bias, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:400:38, read, Fail, , PW_LOOP_CO_TILE, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:378:30, 214-232, Access load is in the conditional branch
pw_bias, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:400:38, read, Fail, , PW_LOOP_CO_TILE, src/mobilenet_block_accel.cpp:378:30, 214-230, Stride is incompatible

Msg.msg_body: Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region
